title: Pope creates group to study artificial intelligence as Vatican prepares to release his first encyclical
description: Pope Leo XIV formed the group as part of his ongoing concern about the technology and its ethical implications.

title: OpenAI Is Offering ChatGPT Plus To Citizens Of Malta For A Year
description: Residents will have to go through a course on artificial intelligence before activating the subscription.
content: OpenAI has signed deals with fintech startups, tech giants and even Disney, but it's breaking new ground by announcing a "world's first partnership" with the country of Malta. In a post on its website, OpenAI said that it would provide ChatGPT Plus f... [1103 chars]

title: AI governance is hiring
description: OVER 92 percent of Philippine organizations use artificial intelligence. Fewer than one in eight have hired someone to govern it. The Swarm Philippine AI Report 2025, based on a nationwide survey of 175 organizations, has a term for it: “vibe-based” AI use. Fifty-seven percent cite talent scarcity as their top barrier to scaling. So where are the jobs?

title: Musk-OpenAI Trial Nears High-Stakes Verdict
description: A federal jury in California is preparing to deliberate in Elon Musk’s high-stakes lawsuit against OpenAI, a case that could reshape the future of the artificial intelligence company and threaten CEO Sam Altman’s leadership.

title: AI Poised to Tilt Job Market Leverage Toward Older Workers
description: When it comes to job cuts, older workers are often disproportionately affected. But a new survey of chief executive officers suggests this won’t be a given as companies adopt artificial intelligence.

title: The Vatican gearing up for release of the pope's encyclical
